Title: Census Bureau Data

URL Source: https://data.census.gov/

Markdown Content:
## Explore Census Data

Learn about America's People and Economy

Search for an area, a topic, or both

[Try searching for commute in all counties in Delaware in 2017](https://data.census.gov/all?q=commute+in+all+counties+in+Delaware+in+2017)

## find

[## tables](https://data.census.gov/table)

[![Image 1: Table displaying data from the 2017 Economic Census.](https://data.census.gov/assets/Tables_Desktop-f5c05539.webp)](https://data.census.gov/table/ECNBASIC2017.EC1700BASIC?g=0500000US24001,24003)

Explore the thousands of tables we have. We are adding new tables every week.

[Explore Tables](https://data.census.gov/table)

## build

[## maps](https://data.census.gov/map)

Build customized maps from any variable in our data tables. Just select your geographies.

[![Image 2: Map visualizing Gini Index data from the 2020 American Community Survey.](https://data.census.gov/assets/Maps_Desktop-77bbe43e.webp)](https://data.census.gov/map/0100000US$0500000/ACSDT5Y2020/B19083/B19083_001E?layer=VT_2020_050_00_PY_D1&breaks=Manual(0.5)&loc=37.7292,-99.0216,z3.0000)

[![Image 3: Profile displaying a map of and demographic information about Accokeek CDP, Maryland.](https://data.census.gov/assets/profile-place-(d)@1x-a2cf4d36.webp)](https://data.census.gov/profile/Accokeek_CDP,_Maryland?g=160XX00US2400250)

Learn about

[America's](https://data.census.gov/profile/United_States?g=010XX00US)
communities through our data profiles. They cover 100,000+ different geographies: [states](https://data.census.gov/profile/Illinois?g=040XX00US17), [counties](https://data.census.gov/profile/Dubuque_County,_Iowa?g=050XX00US19061), .[places](https://data.census.gov/profile/Accokeek_CDP,_Maryland?g=160XX00US2400250), [tribal areas](https://data.census.gov/profile/Mescalero_Reservation,_NM?g=2500000US2205), .[zip codes](https://data.census.gov/profile/ZCTA5_90210?g=860XX00US90210),  and [congressional districts](https://data.census.gov/profile/Congressional_District_(at_Large),_Montana?g=500XX00US3000).  For each, we cover topics like education, employment, health, and housing just to name a few.

## get

[## started](https://www.census.gov/data/what-is-data-census-gov.html)
Check out our help resources, FAQs, quick start guides, and release information

![Image 4: Getting Started with Your Search on data.census.gov video thumbnail](https://data.census.gov/assets/bottom-card-getting-started-data-census-gov-title-card-341e2b41.png)

Getting Started with Your Search on data.census.gov

![Image 5: Touring the Mapping Feature on data.census.gov video thumbnail](https://data.census.gov/assets/bottom-card-touring-mapping-features-title-card-b0df1ddc.png)

Touring the Mapping Feature on data.census.gov

![Image 6: Exploring the Microdata Access Tool (MDAT) on data.census.gov video thumbnail](https://data.census.gov/assets/bottom-card-exploring-microdata-access-tool-title-card-ff5f9310.png)

Exploring the Microdata Access Tool (MDAT) on data.census.gov
